title: 10 best herbal creams for jaundice

remedies.remedy_desc: Cassia auriculata creams helps with jaundice because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The extract from Cassia auriculata, also known as 'Amukkuram', has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat liver and digestive disorders. It is believed to enhance liver function, reduce bilirubin levels, and promote the excretion of waste products, thereby reducing the symptoms of jaundice. The cream's soothing and calming effects also help to comfort the skin and reduce itching associated with jaundice.

Terminalia chebula creams helps with jaundice because of its hepatoprotective properties, which aid in liver health and function. The herb contains chebulinic acid, chebulagic acid, and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat liver and gallbladder issues. Chebulinic acid has been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce liver inflammation and promote bile flow, thereby alleviating jaundice symptoms. This traditional herbal remedy has been used for centuries to support liver health and treat various liver-related disorders.

Curcuma longa creams helps with jaundice because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which aid in reducing liver inflammation and promoting its natural healing process. The active compound, curcumin, in these creams has been shown to improve liver function, enhance bile production, and increase the conjugation of bilirubin, a key factor in jaundice. By reducing bilirubin levels and promoting liver health, Curcuma longa creams may help alleviate symptoms associated with jaundice, such as yellowing of the skin and eyes.

Silybum marianum creams helps with jaundice because they contain silymarin, a bioactive compound that has hepatoprotective properties. Silymarin helps to regenerate liver cells, reduce oxidative stress, and improve liver function, which can aid in the reduction of jaundice symptoms. The anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of silymarin also help to alleviate the discomfort and inflammation associated with jaundice, making it a popular natural remedy for this condition. Regular use of silymarin creams may help to alleviate jaundice symptoms and promote overall liver health.

Glycyrrhiza glabra creams helps with jaundice because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The licorice root extract in these creams has been traditionally used to soothe and protect the liver and gallbladder. It aids in the breakdown and excretion of bilirubin, a key compound responsible for the yellow discoloration associated with jaundice. By promoting liver function and reducing oxidative stress, Glycyrrhiza glabra creams may help alleviate jaundice symptoms and support overall liver health. Its potential benefits in this area are still being researched and explored.

Phyllanthus niruri creams helps with jaundice because of its unique properties that aid in the reduction of bilirubin levels in the blood. The herb is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. These compounds help in the breakdown of bilirubin, a key component in jaundice, and promote its elimination from the body. Additionally, Phyllanthus niruri has been traditionally used to support liver function and promote overall digestive health, making it a promising natural remedy for jaundice treatment.

Zingiber officinale creams helps with jaundice because of its anti-inflammatory properties and ability to stimulate digestion. The active compounds in ginger, such as gingerols and shogaols, help to reduce inflammation in the liver and promote the elimination of bilirubin, the pigment responsible for jaundice. Additionally, ginger has a natural warming effect that can help to stimulate bile production, further aiding in the reduction of jaundice symptoms. This makes ginger a potentially beneficial treatment for jaundice.

Murraya koenigii creams helps with jaundice because they contain triterpenoid compounds, specifically koenigine, which has been found to have hepatoprotective properties. These compounds help to protect the liver from damage and promote the removal of bilirubin, a key factor in jaundice. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of Murraya koenigii creams may also help to soothe the liver and promote its natural healing processes, making them a potential natural remedy for jaundice.

Artemisia absinthium creams helps with jaundice because they contain compounds like thujone and bornyl acetate, which have been traditionally used to stimulate liver function and improve bile flow. The antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties of these compounds may help reduce liver congestion and alleviate symptoms of jaundice, such as yellowing of the skin and eyes. Additionally, Artemisia absinthium creams may promote liver detoxification, helping to remove bilirubin and other toxins that contribute to jaundice.

Eclipta alba creams helps with jaundice because of its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds help to reduce bilirubin levels in the liver, promoting its proper functioning and facilitating the breakdown of this pigment. Additionally, Eclipta alba creams may enhance liver regeneration and support its natural detoxification processes, ultimately aiding in the resolution of jaundice symptoms and promoting overall liver health. Its natural properties make it a promising alternative for jaundice treatment.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for jaundice are topical treatments derived from plants and herbs that help alleviate the symptoms of jaundice, a condition characterized by the buildup of bilirubin in the body, causing yellowing of the skin and eyes. The best herbal creams for jaundice include Cassia auriculata, Terminalia chebula, Curcuma longa, Silybum marianum, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Phyllanthus niruri, Zingiber officinale, Murraya koenigii, Artemisia absinthium, and Eclipta alba. If left untreated, jaundice can lead to liver damage, fatigue, and a weakened immune system, significantly impacting daily life, affecting work, social activities, and overall well-being.
